title: allium altoatlanticum
intro: Allium altoatlanticum, a species of wild garlic, is a type of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and antiviral properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure. Allium altoatlanticum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
